creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
> … Printed copies can be purchased at the FreeBSD Mall. …

At the home page of the Mall: 

> The FreeBSD HandBook 3rd Edition (Volume 2)

– an old SALE item. 

A site-wide search for 'handbook' finds no other edition. 

From PR <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/pull/57>: 

> The available FreeBSD Handbook, 3rd Ed, Admin Guide (Vol 2) 
> (ISBN 1-57176-328-7) was "completely up to date for the latest 
> FreeBSD 4.x and 5.x versions.", versions that reached end of life 
> years ago.
